{{Quote|Move it, move it, move it! What the heck are you waiting for, Briggs? An engraved invitation? Get out there and kill some Rebels!|[[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] Hong to [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Briggs (stormtrooper)|Briggs]] during the [[Battle of AX-456]]|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />}}
'''Hong''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']] as of [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. He was killed at the [[Battle of AX-456]].

==Biography==
Hong was experienced with Cadets, and knew that almost everyone were too proud to ask for his advice. He witnessed several [[Omega Exercise]]s where cadets served as [[Cadet Leader]]s, and could notice the nervousness during their task. Many of them were against [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], and knew that, despite what Imperial propaganda was saying, they did give a hard fight. During Cadet Leader [[Kyle Katarn]]'s [[Omega Exercise]] on [[AX-456]], [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] Hong served as [[Executive officer/Legends|second officer]] to the [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] and Katarn knew that his report and opinion would count for his evaluation.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

Expecting bullying and sarcastic comments, Katarn kept his distance from Hong, hiding his stress and fear; Hong in turn tried to encourage him and reminded him that he would succeed if he follows the rules, and complimented him for loading his weapon like a veteran. [[Gender/Legends|He]] appreciated Katarn's rational approach to the military operation, but disapproved of his reluctance to execute Rebel [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] of [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]]. Hong executed Katarn's commands and ordered [[Morley]] to break the entrance to the base. Once they secured the two [[Airlock/Legends|airlocks]], he killed a Rebel equipped with a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibroaxe]]. While regrouping, Hong advised the Leader to call for reinforcements before pressing on.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

He led the charge that secured the next room and fifty feet of passageway where they encountered more oposition. Once they secured the corridor, he ordered the remaining platoon to scavenge for [[Blaster power pack/Legends|power paks]] and make a makeshift wall of droid parts before blowing the door at the end. Another fight ensued behind the door, and the Rebel presence was all but eliminated when Katarn ordered to stop firing, surprising Hong. Katarn hid his unwillingness to commit a massacre, saying that they don't need to waste their ammo on Rebels who surrendered.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

The two-thirds of the original platoon that survived looked for the communications room, and Hong reprimanded [[Dendu]] for wasting ammo in his attempt to shoot a [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]]. In the control room Hong noticed on a monitor that a ship with [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|reinforcements]] arrived, and suggested to kill everyone and escape while they had time, which Katarn objected, further surprising Hong. He complied, under protest, and ordered [[Jonsey]] and [[Haku]] to pull the [[memory module]]s and set explosive charges. Hong and the rest were barricated in the cafeteria waiting to be rescued by [[Storm commando/Legends|reinforcements]]; they didn't expect that the Rebels would drill into the wall; Hong was killed once Rebels poured from the drilled hole.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

==Personality and traits==
Hong was small in body but had a strong voice. He had short hair and a moustache—a rarity among stormtroopers of his [[Time/Legends|time]]. Hong was supportive and encouraging to Cadet Leader Katarn and expressed his compliments when he was doing things right. He disagreed with the hesitation and reluctance of his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|men]] towards handling rebels. The man expressed such to Kyle Katarn and [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] [[Briggs (stormtrooper)|Briggs]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the audio adaptation of [[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'']], he was voiced by [[James Cada]].<ref name="AD">[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>
